title: SanchitGamerNP Texture Pack
description: Take Your Survival Experience in Minecraft to the Next Level
body:
## 🙏 Read before download 🙏

<details>
<summary>Click Me</summary>

_I can't quite remember who created the resources I used here – I downloaded them years ago. But I want to make sure the **original creators** get the credit they truly deserve. Right now, I'm combining these resources and adding my own unique touch to create a new resource pack. 🙏✨_

</details>

## In this pack:
A thoughtfully created resource pack that will improve your survival experience in Minecraft without totally changing the game's actual game. This pack focuses on enhancing and perfecting parts that already exist while preserving the familiar and beloved Minecraft feel.

<details>
  
<summary>✨ Why This Pack Is Unique</summary>

Your world gets renewed by this resource pack, which improves:
- 🐺 **Mob Textures**: New designs that are real to the style of Minecraft but add character.
- 🎮 **HUD Elements**: Cleaner, easier-to-use interface design; simplified and eye-catching inventory layouts.
- 📦 **Inventory System**: Simple and eye-catching inventory designs.
- 🖥️ **User Interface**: Better user interface parts for an improved gaming experience.

</details>

## <center>![Development Status](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7558bd6367c372df0ed1941c5d7b2dc38624f79.png)<center>


<details>
<summary>Which phase you are?</summary>

**Current Phase:** Alpha & Beta Testing
- Some features are in **Alpha** stage (early development)
- Others have progressed to **Beta** phase (refined and tested)
- This is an ongoing project with regular updates and improvements

</details>



## <center>![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ebdae12ef17f01f775b62ac3e00f623e5b1e71c.png)</center>


<details>
<summary>What is your future goal?</summary>

I'm passionate about filmmaker and lover of filming, I have some exciting plans for the development of this pack:

- **Cinematic Improvement Mode**: Movie-quality graphic elements will be covered in future updates.
- **Storytelling Elements**: Features aimed for bettering machinima and video production.
- **Animation Support**: Static and animated texture variations planned.

> _Note: Current versions do not include cinematic features, which are planned for future releases._

</details>

## <center>![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77902f1203b3dfc0877f59e983b7f38bf348ff53.png)</center>

<details>
<summary>Why you built this resource pack?</summary>

I Built this resourepack using content from a variety of talented creators & designs in the Minecraft community. I don't want 100% credit but I have made some changes myself and I'll keep my credit for that. I'll mention every creator I used. If they want to remove the content I will do if that is legal.


</details>


## <center>![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/faa96330db4f60c2494a57575e366d1df4701457.png)</center>

- **Alpha Versions:** Early features, expect frequent updates
- **Beta Versions:** More stable, refined features ready for testing
- Regular updates based on community feedback and personal improvements

## 💭 A Personal Note
This texture pack was the result of a creative and learning journey. Although the amazing Minecraft community has worked as inspiration for me, every aspect has been carefully chosen and sometimes modified to create something unique. My idea of a modified Minecraft experience that honors the original while pushing creative boundaries is captured in this pack.

_Follow this project for updates, and feel free to share your feedback and suggestions!_

## 🏷️ Tags
